{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321134839AFEE8FC2E79A57257309"}"},"total":642},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7421707593260467006","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常喜欢不同的武则天。作者文笔深厚，将武媚娘描写的栩栩如生！
从最初的天真聪慧，一步一步的到将自己的聪慧变成自己在生活中生存的武器。这是一个大大的转变。","text_exts":[{"e":10,"s":7,"text":"武则天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%AD%A6%E5%88%99%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407211957257309%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227421707593260467006%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227334650172145667097%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%AD%A6%E5%88%99%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728007982,"group_id":"7334650172145667097","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4ZIokxSWbmLzTIbxslxRAD2xJwu4AXOAz5juyFHnxf4","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9294959f4b8e487daa2ee11cd36bf491~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616222&x-signature=S27t5q3knkS239hilSTOly%2FUyms%3D","user_id":"1062590740697204","user_name":"一二三偶耶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1062590740697204","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7334650172145667097","book_info":{"abstract":"她是太宗厌弃的才人，
是感业寺等死的尼姑，
是被家人薄待、被姐妹算计、被命运步步紧逼的女子。
 
世人都说女子柔弱，可她偏要逆天改命。
从深宫婢女，到一代皇后，再到登临九五，
她走过的路，满是鲜血与荆棘。
 
母亲不疼，姐妹反目，丈夫难依，子女难靠。
既然无人可依，那便自己撑天；
既然真情换不来真心，那便手握权柄，执掌乾坤。
 
她忍过最惨的低谷，也坐过最高的王座。
心狠，是被逼出来的铠甲；
强势，是活下去的唯一出路。
 
一代女皇武曌，
不恋儿女情长，只握万里江山。
千秋功过，且留无字碑，任人评说。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e7419c7df6ce21c0400b80d056d2f202","author":"喜欢鞭尾蝎的卓阁主","author_id":"","book_id":"7334650172145667097","book_name":"无字碑：武曌秘史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d09830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":84,"name":"皇后","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=84&name=皇后&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":877,"name":"古色古香","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=877&name=古色古香&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7335805993336439320","read_count":"13710","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1318609"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"680","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,皇后,女强,古色古香","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5c36d99057fa4b9adac169a9c81effaf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256119&x-signature=dE2YL6lR9jRcluEeJpzVHn6Fk18%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2915532950477307","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"283"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321134839AFEE8FC2E79A57257309"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":86752,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":116055,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1781},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1728008103,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7418584887127622425","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书让我看到了不一样的女皇，她从一个天真的少女，慢慢成长，经历过受宠失宠之后，开始努力学习，不断的提升自己，从而一步一步的走到最高峰，俯瞰整个世界，当老天成为她的NPC，她也没有被打败，而是靠着自己的智慧和能力，走出一片属于自己的天地。","text_exts":[{"e":85,"s":82,"text":"NPC","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=NPC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407211957257309%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227418584887127622425%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227334650172145667097%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22NPC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727277071,"group_id":"7334650172145667097","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"静心看世界，我的世界我做主！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N34h2kGqUlU65nUD+fe94Vk=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6d5f8f96940449e79743fc5aca7e487a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616585&x-signature=FdL%2FJI96LgjFEKN49Mw2dPPTIXk%3D","user_id":"84660897109","user_name":"悦读悦行"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"84660897109","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FF
